info.title: Enji Guard Reconstructed API
info.description: Unofficial OpenAPI contract reconstructed from observed Enji Guard browser traffic. The upstream service does not publish this contract.

get.summary: Return current authenticated user profile.

post.summary: Refresh the short-lived access cookie using the long-lived refresh cookie.

200.description: Access token refreshed and returned through Set-Cookie.

get.summary: Return plan, access, schedule, and audit-run limits.
Return UI user preferences.
Return metric groups, curated actions, and audit autofixes.
Return curated actions with Fleet runbook identifiers.
List projects with repository identifiers and compact scores.

post.summary: Create the UX project record for an existing Fleet project.

get.summary: Return active runs for a project.
Return project members.
Return active runs for a repository.
Return repository executive summaries.
Return repository improvement history for a metric group.
Return repository code-review state inside a project.

put.summary: Trigger or update repository code-review state inside a project.

get.summary: Return all audit schedule jobs for a repository.
Return improvement job kind to Fleet schedule bindings.

put.summary: Create or update an audit schedule job.

post.summary: Resume a paused audit schedule job.

put.summary: Bind an audit job to a Fleet schedule.

get.summary: Return server-selected schedule-load hints.
Return resolved email preferences for a repository audit.

put.summary: Update per-audit email preference override fields.

patch.summary: Update per-audit email preference override fields.

post.summary: Create the canonical Fleet project record.

delete.summary: Delete the canonical Fleet project record and cascade its data.

get.summary: Return project details.

patch.summary: Update project metadata, such as name.

get.summary: Return repository ordering for a project.

put.summary: Update repository ordering for a project.

post.summary: Add a web resource to a project.

delete.summary: Detach a web-resource repository from a project.

get.summary: List repositories available through a GitHub App installation.
Verify repository access for a GitHub App installation.

post.summary: Connect a GitHub repository to a project.

get.summary: List GitHub App installations linked to the account.

post.summary: Claim a GitHub App installation after OAuth.
Preflight a repository transfer between projects.

put.summary: Update audit auto-run settings through the alternate route-slug endpoint.

get.summary: Return a Fleet task.
Return activity for a Fleet task.
Return task notifications.
Return repository-task links.
Return a Fleet runbook.
Return pentest jobs for a repository.
Return project activity timeline.
Return project code-review summary.
Return project run language settings.
Return a repository report snapshot.
Return repository audit email watches.
Return the markdown report snapshot for an audit route slug.
Return current head and per-audit rerun eligibility.
Return runbook freshness for an audit action.
Return repository audit history.
Return autofix backlog state for an improvement fix kind.
Check admin access gate.
Return pentest consent state.

post.summary: Submit developer feedback with optional screenshots.

sessionCookie.name: Cookie
sessionCookie.description: Raw Cookie header copied from an authenticated browser session. Exact upstream cookie names are opaque.

GenericObject.description: Object response not yet narrowed in the reconstructed contract.

Forbidden.description: The authenticated or refresh credential is not accepted.
